summary: Comprehensive testing of FreeBuild Website Builder (no-templates AI conversational builder) + Image Wizard 14 categories + Video Wizard 10 categories with voice library. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend test cases verified successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: FreeBuild module correctly implements 17 Y/N questions + 3 free-text fields (site_name, vision, primary_color)
FreeBuild uses OPENAI_DIRECT_KEY (gpt-4o) for HTML generation - independent from Emergent LLM pool
Image Wizard has 14 categories with expert personas for prompt engineering before image generation
Video Wizard has 10 categories with director personas + 15-voice library including 2 Arabic voices (Mohammed Almansari, Layan)
FreeBuild costs: 25 credits/generate, 10 credits/refine - correctly implemented
Landing page CTA correctly routes to /build-from-zero (not /websites)
context_for_next_testing_agent: FreeBuild + Image/Video Wizard expansions fully tested. Key findings: (1) GET /api/freebuild/catalog returns 17 questions + 3 free_text_fields + costs (25/10), (2) Full FreeBuild flow works: start → 17 Y/N answers → 3 free-text → generate returns HTML >5KB with RTL support, (3) GET /api/freebuild/preview/{id} returns text/html, (4) POST /api/freebuild/refine increments version, (5) DELETE /api/freebuild/project/{id} works, (6) GET /api/wizard/image/categories returns 14 categories including new: logo, poster, thumbnail, ebook_cover, app_icon, real_estate, fashion, automotive, (7) GET /api/wizard/video/categories returns 10 categories including new: short_film, fashion, automotive_ad + voice_library with 15 voices (2 Arabic), (8) Landing page CTA navigates to /build-from-zero correctly.

features_verified.test_1_freebuild_catalog: ✅ GET /api/freebuild/catalog returns questions_count=17, 3 free_text_fields, generate_cost=25, refine_cost=10
features_verified.test_2_freebuild_start: ✅ POST /api/freebuild/start returns session_id, phase='yn', step=1, total_yn=17
features_verified.test_3_freebuild_full_flow: ✅ 17 Y/N answers + 3 free-text → phase='ready' with estimated_cost=25
features_verified.test_4_freebuild_generate: ✅ POST /api/freebuild/generate returns project with id, name, version=1, html (>5KB), preview_url
features_verified.test_6_freebuild_projects: ✅ GET /api/freebuild/projects returns list without heavy html field
features_verified.test_9_image_14_categories: ✅ GET /api/wizard/image/categories returns 14 categories with new: logo, poster, thumbnail, ebook_cover, app_icon, real_estate, fashion, automotive
features_verified.test_10_video_10_categories: ✅ GET /api/wizard/video/categories returns 10 categories with new: short_film, fashion, automotive_ad
features_verified.test_11_voice_library: ✅ voice_library has 15 voices including 2 Arabic (Mohammed Almansari, Layan)
features_verified.test_13_frontend_yn_stage: ✅ Click start → Y/N stage with [data-testid='freebuild-yn-stage'], yes/no buttons work
features_verified.test_15_chatimage_categories: ✅ /chat/image shows all 14 categories including new: لوقو, بوستر, ثَمب, غلاف كتاب, أيقونة تطبيق, عقار, أزياء, سيارات

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (OpenAI gpt-4o for FreeBuild, Gemini/OpenAI for images, Sora 2 for videos)
